full_text:
Zhuge Rong (Shuchang) 諸葛融 (叔長)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhuge Rong (諸葛融), styledShuchang (叔長), was born in Yangdu in Langxie. Not a good scholar but charitable and skilled in art. Killed himself when Zhuge Ke fell. Zhuge Rong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
